main.name: Nikhila Etikyala
main.bio: Hi there! I am Sonny! You might also know me as PAPA React. I've been coding for over 10 years now. As a Full Stack developer I've worked both with startups and large corporations to help build & scale their companies. Along the journey I realised my passion existed in helping others excel and pursue their dreams as upcoming developers. With this passion, I have now trained thousand's of developers across the globe. Through live coaching sessions on Youtube, I have accumulated several MILLION views demonstrating how to apply developer skills in a range of cool builds and challenges. I deliver REAL VALUE by teaching REAL WORLD projects to help students enter the world of web development. You’ll get hands-on experience and learn the skills that are required to succeed in the real-world in this community.
main.contactmessage: Get in touch with me to be a part of the PAPA fam!

work.title: Software Engineer
description: Increased data integrity by 60% and reduced data entry errors by 15% by implementing enhanced data models and constraints using Groovy, impacting over 2,000 users.
Expanded product functionality by 30%, resulting in a 25% user satisfaction increase, by developing a provider similar to Google Mail and Calendar, supporting over 5,000 users.
Streamlined user registration for Super Admins using SQL, Postman, Groovy, and Grails, leading to a 50% reduction in administrative workload and a 30% increase in user onboarding.

work.title: Programmer Analyst Trainee
description: Enhanced proficiency in Data Structures, Algorithms, and Advanced Java by 90% through focused training, enabling the resolution of complex challenges in projects affecting over 1,000 users.
Actively engaged in multiple assessments throughout the training program, consistently achieving an average score of 95%.
